<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/public/{organisation}/{event}/bundles"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Public endpoint to get all bundles for a given organisation and event.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
